description_long: This is a modern two-story house nestled among snow-covered boulders and surrounded by evergreen pine trees. The house features a clean, rectangular design with large windows on both floors, allowing for ample natural light and scenic views. The exterior is clad in natural wood, contrasting with the white snow and green trees. The roof is a simple gable style, and the main entryway is accessible via a small set of steps leading to a covered porch. The landscape is dominated by large, rounded rocks and dense clusters of pine trees, creating a secluded, alpine atmosphere. The house appears well-insulated and designed for a cold, mountainous environment.
description: A modern, wood-clad two-story house with large windows, surrounded by snow-covered rocks and pine trees in an alpine setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the house nestled among pine trees and snow-covered rocks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the dense arrangement of rocks and trees to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back facade partially obscured by large snow-covered boulders and a few visible windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side wall, more pine trees, and the continuation of the rocky, snowy landscape.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, and large glass door
